name: Nginaajiiw Salon & Spa
description: Full-service salon and spa in Sagamok Anishnawbek offering hair, esthetics, massage, and nail services.
address: 610-7 Sagamok Road, Sagamok Anishnawbek, ON P0P 2L0

name: Z'gamok Enterprises Inc.
description: 100% Indigenous-owned corporation of Sagamok Anishnawbek providing construction, mining support, and economic development services across Northern Ontario.

name: Z'gamok Construction LP
description: Indigenous-owned construction company offering heavy civil construction, ore crushing, haulage, and site maintenance for the mining sector.

name: Serpent River Trading Post
description: Community-owned trading post on Highway 17 featuring an art gallery with First Nation and Canadian fine art, gas station, convenience store, and seasonal gift shop.

name: Serpent River First Nation Economic Development Corporation
description: Economic development corporation serving Serpent River First Nation and surrounding communities with business support, partnerships, and growth initiatives.

name: Tanner's Your Independent Grocer
description: Locally owned grocery store serving Espanola and the surrounding area with fresh produce, bakery, deli, and pharmacy services.

name: Espanola Regional Hospital and Health Centre
description: 79-bed acute care facility providing emergency, diagnostic imaging, rehabilitation, and family health services to Espanola and surrounding communities.

name: Cortina Restaurant
description: Family-style Italian restaurant in downtown Espanola serving the community with homestyle meals.

name: Martins Country Market
description: Outdoor market on Highway 17 in Massey offering local produce and seasonal goods.

name: CJ's Auto and Varieties
description: Auto repair and variety store on Sable Street in Massey serving local vehicle maintenance needs.

name: Massey Area Museum
description: Local heritage museum preserving and sharing the history of Massey and the surrounding Sables-Spanish Rivers area.

name: Fireside Classic Restaurant
description: Locally owned family restaurant in Elliot Lake offering classic comfort food and a welcoming atmosphere.

name: Maamwesying North Shore Community Health Services
description: Indigenous community health organization providing health programs, mental health support, and wellness services to North Shore First Nations communities.

name: Sagamok Naandwedjige-Gamik Health Centre
description: Community wellness centre in Sagamok Anishnawbek providing health care, health programs, and community wellness services.

name: Waubetek Business Development Corporation
description: Aboriginal financial institution providing business development support, loans, and advisory services to Indigenous entrepreneurs across Northeastern Ontario.
